Happie Couple
Home Privacy Terms Support

Terms of Service for Happie Couple

Last Updated: February 10, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using the Happie Couple mobile application (“App”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (“Terms”). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the App.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old to use this App. By using the App, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years of age.

3. Account Registration

Creating an Account

  • You must provide accurate and complete information
  • You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
  • You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account
  • You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access

Partner Linking

  • Linking with a partner requires both parties’ consent
  • You may only link with one partner at a time
  • Either partner may unlink at any time
  • Unlinking does not automatically delete shared content

4. Acceptable Use

You May

  • Use the App for personal, non-commercial purposes
  • Share content with your linked partner
  • Export your own data at any time

You May NOT

  • Use the App for any illegal purpose
  • Harass, abuse, or harm another person
  • Impersonate any person or entity
  • Interfere with or disrupt the App’s functionality
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the App or other users’ accounts
  • Use automated systems (bots, scrapers) to access the App
  • Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
  • Remove or modify any proprietary notices
  • Use the App to collect information about other users

5. Content

Your Content

  • You retain ownership of content you create
  • You grant us a license to use, store, and display your content to provide the service
  • You are responsible for the content you create and share
  • You must not upload illegal, harmful, or offensive content

Partner’s Content

  • Shared content is accessible to both partners
  • Respect your partner’s privacy and content
  • Do not misuse or share your partner’s content outside the App

Our Content

  • The App and its features are our intellectual property
  • You may not copy, modify, or distribute our content without permission
  • App name, logo, and branding are our trademarks

6. Subscriptions and Payments

Free Tier

  • Basic features are available for free
  • May have limitations compared to premium

Premium Subscription

  • Billed monthly or annually through Apple App Store or Google Play Store
  • Prices displayed in App before purchase
  • Payment processed by Apple/Google, not directly by us
  • Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled

Cancellation

  • Cancel anytime through your Apple/Google account
  • No refunds for partial subscription periods
  • Access continues until end of billing period

Changes to Pricing

  • We may modify subscription prices with 30 days notice
  • Price changes do not affect current subscribers until renewal

7. Termination

By You

  • You may delete your account at any time via Settings
  • Deletion is permanent and cannot be undone
  • Data will be deleted within 30 days

By Us

We may suspend or terminate your account if you:

  • Violate these Terms
  • Engage in fraudulent activity
  • Abuse or harass other users
  • Use the App for illegal purposes

8. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE APP IS PROVIDED “AS IS” AND “AS AVAILABLE” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

  • Warranties of merchantability
  • Fitness for a particular purpose
  • Non-infringement
  • Uninterrupted or error-free service
  • Accuracy or reliability of content

9. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, HAPPIE COUPLE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR:

  • Indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages
  • Loss of data, profits, or revenue
  • Relationship issues or personal harm
  • Damages arising from use or inability to use the App

OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE PAST 12 MONTHS, OR $100, WHICHEVER IS GREATER.

10. Professional Advice Disclaimer

IMPORTANT: Happie Couple is NOT a substitute for professional relationship counseling, therapy, or medical advice.

  • The App provides general relationship guidance only
  • AI-generated insights are not professional advice
  • If you are experiencing serious relationship issues, please seek help from a licensed professional
  • In case of emergency or crisis, contact appropriate emergency services

11. Privacy

Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your data.

12. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Happie Couple from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from:

  • Your use of the App
  • Your violation of these Terms
  • Your violation of any rights of another user
  • Content you submit to the App

13. Changes to Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by:

  • Posting updated Terms in the App
  • Sending email notification
  • Displaying in-app notification

Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of new Terms.

14. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by the laws of [Your State/Country], without regard to conflict of law principles.

15. Dispute Resolution

Informal Resolution

Before filing a claim, you agree to try to resolve disputes by contacting us at support@happiecouple.app

Arbitration

Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration rather than in court, except where prohibited by law.

Class Action Waiver

You agree to resolve disputes individually, not as part of a class action.

16. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions will remain in full effect.

17. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Happie Couple.

18. Contact Us

Questions about these Terms? Contact us:

Email: support@happiecouple.app
In-App: Settings > Help & Support > Contact Us

Summary (Plain Language)

  • Age: Must be 18+ to use
  • Accounts: Keep your login secure, one partner link at a time
  • Behavior: Be respectful, don’t abuse the service
  • Content: You own your content, we can use it to provide the service
  • Subscriptions: Cancel anytime, no refunds for partial periods
  • Liability: We’re not liable for relationship issues - seek professional help if needed
  • Changes: We’ll notify you of any Term changes

Questions? Email support@happiecouple.app

© 2026 Happie Couple. Built for healthier conversations.

Privacy Policy Terms of Service
